scope_summary: Bounded observe-only target-local investigation of the BusinessFlow-side AFF session entrypoint. Correlate same-window Apache and FireFlow evidence around /FireFlow/api/session, /fa/environment/getAFASessionInfo, and /afa/external//bridge/refresh with BusinessFlow PHP context. Prefer SSOLogin.php, SuiteLoginSessionValidation.php, AlgosecSessionManager.php, ExtUtils.php, and any local source or log evidence that narrows the initiating BusinessFlow-side caller or cookie branch before FireFlow serves the AFF session. Preserve findings and artifacts only; do not intentionally modify target state.
